comment: FR-CMP-001 make-compound audio playback: collapsing replaces the selection with one kind-video compound clip on a VIDEO track whose nested sequence carries the collapsed audio, so audio resolution must mix sequence-backed clips found on video tracks. Track 0 is that video track (kind: video) hosting a unit-gain compound over a mono staircase source [1,2,3,4]; track 1 is a plain outer audio bed at a constant 0.5. Reference = compound + bed = [1.5,2.5,3.5,4.5] on both channels. The pre-fix regression (audio resolution iterating only audio tracks / only kind-audio clips) renders just the bed and fails with maxAbsError=4.0 against the 1e-5 tolerance; the bed keeps the wrong output non-empty so the failure is specifically the missing compound contribution. Audio golden math is pure CPU rational/float arithmetic, machine-independent, so the tolerance stays at the suite-wide 1e-5.
